decisions: Preserved UI127/UI128 source-backed BG1005 UI_bg binding while preserving existing UI_bg raycast/interactable values.
Mounted only the real Hero1005 main SkeletonGraphic child Painting_1005 with decoded homePara [1,0,0]; no Painting_1005_back/front layer was mounted.
Attached source-built UI_Dock root as a sibling form above old-root UI_MainInterface_old, matching UI_Dock open-stack evidence rather than importing old node_bottom/toogles.
Applied only UI_Dock Lua default MAIN_PAGE on/off state from initTab; no fake dock icons/text or dummy click handlers were created.
Did not hide or alter activity stack, face activity, btn_discord, UI_bg raycast/interactable, route/world nodes, or zhuye_di1/zhuye_bian.
